data.description:
# Sweep: grounding/ + _engine_support/ to the observability floor (+ fix BLE0001 typo)

Includes a specific landmine: `src/rebar/grounding/harness.py:281` carries a typo'd `# noqa: BLE0001`
(extra `0`), so the noqa is inert and that `except BaseException` will newly flag when BLE001 gates —
fix the typo and bring the site into compliance.

## What
- Bring broad-excepts in `src/rebar/grounding/` and `src/rebar/_engine_support/` to the observability floor
  (log `exc_info` or justified `# noqa: BLE001`).
- Fix the `BLE0001` -> `BLE001` typo at `src/rebar/grounding/harness.py:281` and narrow/justify that
  `except BaseException` (must not swallow `KeyboardInterrupt`/`SystemExit`).
- Migrate stderr-diagnostic prints in these packages to the named logger.
- Remove these packages from the BLE001/T201 allowlist as they become conformant.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Broad-excepts in `grounding/` and `_engine_support/` meet the observability floor.
- [ ] `grounding/harness.py:281` typo fixed; the `except BaseException` no longer swallows
      `KeyboardInterrupt`/`SystemExit`.
- [ ] Stderr diagnostics migrate to `logging.getLogger(__name__)`.
- [ ] These packages removed from the allowlist; `make lint` + full test suite pass.
data.title: Sweep: grounding + _engine_support to observability floor (+ fix BLE0001 typo)
